meta.ogDesc: Ike leads on 0 pts after 72/104 matches

story: Lording it at the top, Ike has 6 team(s) yet to kick a ball (France, Uruguay, Iran, Algeria, Uzbekistan, Ghana) — clinging to 'games in hand' like it's a personality. It won't save them. Smugly in tow, Ellie is boring everyone into an early grave — 6 clean sheets, zero entertainment. The kind of football that makes people emigrate. Rounding out the insufferable elite, Elsa will be replaying Portugal (all flair, pout and theatrical collapses)'s 5-0 all tournament because, let's be honest, it's the only good thing their team will ever do. Frame it.

Wallowing in mid-table sludge, Murray had to sit and watch New Zealand (the All Whites: good time, not a long time) get battered 1-5 — and we'll be bringing it up at every opportunity for the rest of their natural life. Equally forgettable, Sid is just... there. 0 pts, 0W 0D 0L. A complete non-entity — we genuinely forgot they were playing until just now. Barely clinging to relevance, Quince has 6 team(s) yet to kick a ball (Argentina, Mexico, Austria, Sweden, South Africa, Bosnia Herzegovina) — clinging to 'games in hand' like it's a personality. It won't save them.

Down in the dregs, Etan has 6 team(s) yet to kick a ball (England, Senegal, Australia, Paraguay, Congo Republic, Saudi Arabia) — clinging to 'games in hand' like it's a personality. It won't save them. And scraping the very bottom of the barrel, Big Pewerk has 6 team(s) yet to kick a ball (Netherlands, Colombia, Switzerland, Ivory Coast, Iraq, Jordan) — clinging to 'games in hand' like it's a personality. It won't save them.
